tasks.task: lock schema migration, source hash validation, pilot scope, checkpoint/resume and disjoint output directories before any full remediation.
input_paths: docs/直播录屏解析方案_live_recording_analysis/新录屏多模态解析规划_new_recording_multimodal_plan/data/event_schema.json
docs/直播录屏解析方案_live_recording_analysis/全量解析补齐复审_full_analysis_completion_review/04_缺口清单_gap_manifest.json
tasks.alibaba_api_route: capability check only; no raw payload committed
tasks.done_when: machine approval remains full_execution=false until pilot_review_decision=approved and all preflight checks pass.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: classify each ASR segment as host speech, song/background/platform/other speaker/noise; flag usable host speech.
input_paths: docs/直播录屏解析方案_live_recording_analysis/最新直播全量取证解析_latest_live_full_evidence_analysis/04_事件时间轴索引_event_timeline_index.csv
tasks.output_contract: audio_segment_classification.jsonl + updated redacted speaker event candidates
tasks.alibaba_api_route: Fun-ASR existing results; no full ASR rerun unless low-quality spans are identified
tasks.done_when: all ASR-derived speaker events have classification fields and non-host audio is excluded from course/rule generation.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: merge/split events around topic switches, comment appearances, replies, course segments, sales nodes and anomalies.
tasks.alibaba_api_route: not required unless missing modality evidence needs Qwen-VL backfill
tasks.done_when: each semantic event has source event ids, start/end, event_type, trigger and review status.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: use Alibaba Qwen-VL for 60s base scan and dense scans on comment/action/transition windows.
tasks.output_contract: redacted visual window observations + local-only raw responses
tasks.alibaba_api_route: Qwen-VL via existing Alibaba route; estimated_base_scan_windows=663
tasks.done_when: all sessions have base scan coverage and dense scan task records; uncovered spans are explicitly not_observable/source_limit.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: backfill or explicitly invalidate the missing latest_live_07 visual raw response before downstream use.
tasks.output_contract: redacted visual window observations + local-only raw responses
tasks.alibaba_api_route: Qwen-VL via existing Alibaba route; estimated_base_scan_windows=663
tasks.done_when: vision_clips and api_raw counts match for every evidence-bearing window, or missing windows are excluded with reason.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: track redacted comments across frames, distinguish username/body/system message, and store lifecycle fields.
tasks.alibaba_api_route: Qwen-VL for OCR where comments are visible
tasks.done_when: each observable comment has stable redacted id, first_seen_ms, last_seen_ms, dedup_key, intent, risk, final_state.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: arbitrate high-value relations using comment lifecycle, ASR semantic events and visual windows.
tasks.alibaba_api_route: not primary; use existing evidence and targeted Qwen-VL only for ambiguous windows
tasks.done_when: each high-value relation has response_link_type, evidence spans, alternatives, confidence and review outcome.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: extract observable actions from dense Qwen-VL windows and mark not_observable where needed.
tasks.done_when: key events have action fields or explicit not_observable with evidence_ref and confidence.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: derive speech rate, pause before/after and emphasis from ASR timestamps/audio metadata; keep confidence.
tasks.alibaba_api_route: reuse ASR timestamps; no new supplier
tasks.done_when: usable host speech events include measured/derived prosody features and confidence.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: remove false matches, allow no_match, use available bridge/source_quote refs, and mark exact alignment blocked where source is missing.
tasks.alibaba_api_route: optional Qwen text structuring only; exact alignment blocked if source missing
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: regenerate rules only after reply/course/action/prosody validation.
tasks.alibaba_api_route: Qwen text structuring allowed after evidence validation
tasks.done_when: each rule binds event ids, trigger evidence, user state, strategy, course/action/prosody basis and risk.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only

tasks.task: rebuild queue after agent arbitration with evidence, alternatives and review action.
tasks.done_when: final queue contains only unresolved high-risk or low-confidence items ranked by priority.
tasks.write_scope: 5.5 remediation output directory only; first-pass baseline remains read-only
